video.title: Giro d'Italia 2020 - Stage 8 Highlights | Cycling | Eurosport

transcript.clean_text: to stage eight of the judo of italia up the east coast leaving puglia and heading to the north of the same region starting in jovinatso for the first time in six years in judo history a 2014 race ended in a sprint in bari this one much more complicated on the way to yesterday twisting and turning through the gargano national park at a 200 kilometer stage six riders would force their way into breakaway six very strong riders in fact with ravanelli brandley holmes roscott dalset and puccio the latter there for the second time at this race with 100 kilometers on the clock and the same number to go arnold demar would pick up the two points remaining in the intermediate sprint extending his lead by one over peters again that means the point jersey would be on his back at the end of the day again ten and a half minutes for the breakaway climbing the biggest difficulty of the day a ten kilometer second category climb they looked at this stage they'd have a really good chance of taking the win a couple of crashes here and there this one i'm afraid meant the end of the race for ben gastower the rider from luxembourg riding for azure desert he'd not get back on his bike he would be the 14th rider to lead the race after five hadn't started on the day simon yates out of the race with coronavirus eduardo afini sean bennett patrick gamper and tony galapa all having problems with crashes the day before talking of crashes they would again halt the peloton brambila down this time alongside carboni but both after checks with the doctors would get back on had a puncture by this point trek sega fredo had forced the issue but it was all back together and it was clear that the stage win was going to come from the breakaway second categorized climb of the day the final categorized climb of the day went just about to alex dowsett he take the maximum points with holmes coming over in second place 20 points from the day for holmes a good return though and after dowsit and brandley had both been dropped thousand would go away with a second attack of the day there'd be hesitation in the bunch and with one lap of the finishing circuit to go alex dalsep will be putting a serious gap to those chasing he'd get 50 odd seconds that would narrow down to around 25 with holmes and puccio pushing on but dalit was able to rebuild his advantage in the final few kilometers he'd already won stage eight of the girl of italia seven years previous that had been a time trial though and it had been nine years since he won a race on the road dowset though pulling off a super performance and taking israel startup nation's first ever grand tour stage win in their short existence so far a second stage victory in the career at the giro d'italia for alex dallas at the 32 year old from malden in essex behind they'd sprint out for the podium places that particular sprint won by salvatore with holmes finishing third all the glory to alex darsup winning by over a minute the peloton coming down 14 minutes later almost alex downset victor that might help get a contract for next year all those worries put to the back of the mind at the moment and the pink jersey's still on the back of joao almeida 43 seconds ahead of pale bilbao kelderman in third and heading yet again into the mountains i'll neither in pink would he continue to hold it the ninth and final stage of the first week would be in aprusso and heading up to rocarazzo you
